Here is the list of zodiac signs and their corresponding scores on the Myers-Briggs Type Indicator (MBTI) based on their personality traits:
1. Aries - 6/10 - Natural-born leaders, but can be impulsive and reckless.
2. Taurus - 7/10 - Practical and dependable, but can be stubborn and resistant to change.
3. Gemini - 8/10 - Curious and adaptable, but can be scattered and restless.
4. Cancer - 9/10 - Emotional and nurturing, but can be moody and clingy.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Confident and charismatic, but can be prideful and domineering.
6. Virgo - 7/10 - Analytical and hardworking, but can be critical and perfectionistic.
7. Libra - 9/10 - Diplomatic and social, but can be indecisive and people-pleasing.
8. Scorpio - 8/10 - Passionate and intense, but can be secretive and manipulative.
9. Sagittarius - 9/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, but can be blunt and tactless.
10. Capricorn - 7/10 - Disciplined and responsible, but can be serious and rigid.
11. Aquarius - 8/10 - Humanitarian and independent, but can be aloof and unconventional.
12. Pisces - 6/10 - Empathetic and imaginative, but can be dreamy and unreliable.
Please note that these scores are based on general personality traits associated with each sign and may not reflect individual personalities or experiences.
